# ChartingPath — Full Context for AI Assistants

> Pattern-based trading signal discovery, research, and automation platform with 380,000+ outcome-verified historical trades.

## About

ChartingPath is a web platform that helps traders discover, validate, and act on chart pattern setups. It combines automated pattern detection with historical performance data to give traders a statistical edge. The platform is built for discretionary and systematic traders who use technical analysis.

## Key Features

### Live Pattern Screener
- Scans 1,100+ instruments (US stocks, forex pairs, cryptocurrencies, indices, commodities) for active chart patterns
- Supports multiple timeframes: 1-hour, 4-hour, 8-hour, daily, weekly
- Patterns are detected on closed candles only (no intra-candle signals)
- Each detected pattern includes: entry price, stop-loss, take-profit, direction, quality score
- Quality scoring considers trend alignment, volume confirmation, and pattern geometry
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/patterns/live

### Edge Atlas
- Historical win rates, expectancy, and annualized edge for every pattern + timeframe + asset class combination
- Based on 380,000+ resolved pattern occurrences with verified outcomes
- Outcomes tracked at multiple risk-reward ratios: 2R, 3R, 4R, 5R
- Filterable by pattern type, timeframe, asset class, and direction
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/tools/edge-atlas

### Pattern Lab
- Backtest any chart pattern on any ticker using historical data
- Generates equity curves, drawdown analysis, and full trade logs
- Configurable parameters: risk-reward ratio, position sizing, commission, slippage
- Shareable backtest results via unique URLs
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/pattern-lab

### Learning Center
- 100+ educational articles covering:
  - Chart patterns (head & shoulders, double top/bottom, triangles, wedges, flags, cup & handle, rectangles)
  - Candlestick patterns (pin bars, engulfing, doji, hammer, shooting star)
  - Technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, Fibonacci retracements, Bollinger Bands)
  - Trading strategies (breakout trading, trend following, mean reversion, price action)
  - Risk management (position sizing, money management, stop-loss strategies)
  - Trading psychology (discipline, fear & greed, journaling)
  - Algorithmic trading (Pine Script, MQL, strategy automation)
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/learn

### Pattern Library
- Visual reference for all 30+ supported chart patterns
- Each pattern page includes: identification rules, trading rules, Bulkowski statistics, visual examples
- Patterns categorized as: reversal, continuation, bilateral
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/chart-patterns/library

### Trading Copilot
- AI assistant with direct access to the platform's live pattern data and Edge Atlas historical database
- Can search 8,500+ instruments for active signals in real-time
- Provides data-backed answers using 380,000+ historical trade outcomes
- Generates context-aware Pine Script and MQL code

### Script Generator
- Generates ready-to-use Pine Script (TradingView) and MQL4/MQL5 (MetaTrader) code
- Pattern-based strategy templates with configurable parameters
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/members/scripts

### Pattern Quizzes
- Interactive quizzes to test chart pattern identification skills
- Categories: general patterns, stocks, forex, crypto, commodities
- URL: https://chartingpath.com/chart-patterns/quiz

## Data & Methodology

### Dataset
- 380,000+ historical pattern occurrences with verified outcomes (105,210 wins, 274,675 losses at 2R)
- Multi-timeframe: 1h, 4h, 8h, 1D, 1W
- Asset classes: US stocks (~500 tickers), forex pairs (~60), cryptocurrencies (~80), indices (~30), commodities (~20)
- Data sources: Exchange feeds via third-party market data providers
- Ongoing daily scanning and outcome tracking

### Pattern Detection
- Algorithmic detection based on Thomas Bulkowski's Encyclopedia of Chart Patterns
- Patterns detected on closed candles only (no repainting)
- Detected patterns: Head & Shoulders, Inverse Head & Shoulders, Double Top, Double Bottom, Triple Top, Triple Bottom, Ascending Triangle, Descending Triangle, Symmetrical Triangle, Rising Wedge, Falling Wedge, Bull Flag, Bear Flag, Cup & Handle, Inverse Cup & Handle, Donchian Breakout (Long), Donchian Breakout (Short), and more

### Outcome Tracking
- Each pattern is tracked from detection until resolution
- Resolution = price hits take-profit OR stop-loss level
- Outcomes tracked at 2R, 3R, 4R, and 5R risk-reward ratios
- Win rate = (patterns that hit TP) / (total resolved patterns)
- Expectancy = (win_rate × avg_RR) - (loss_rate × 1)

### Quality Scoring
- Each detected pattern receives a quality score: A (highest), B, C, D
- Factors: trend alignment (with/against/neutral), volume confirmation, pattern symmetry, breakout strength
- Higher quality scores historically correlate with higher win rates

## Aggregate Pattern Statistics (at 2R risk-reward)

These are computed from 380,000+ resolved trades. All data is verifiable on the platform.

### Bullish Patterns (sorted by win rate)
| Pattern | Total Trades | Win Rate | Positive Expectancy at 2R? |
|---------|-------------|----------|---------------------------|
| Inverse Head and Shoulders | 3,585 | 37.8% | ✅ Yes |
| Cup & Handle | 672 | 37.4% | ✅ Yes |
| Ascending Triangle | 4,363 | 37.1% | ✅ Yes |
| Double Bottom | 11,949 | 36.1% | ✅ Yes |
| Donchian Breakout (Long) | 7,601 | 35.9% | ✅ Yes |
| Bull Flag | 101 | 35.6% | ✅ Yes |
| Falling Wedge | 33,584 | 35.4% | ✅ Yes |
| Triple Bottom | 37,394 | 35.0% | ✅ Yes |

### Bearish Patterns (sorted by win rate)
| Pattern | Total Trades | Win Rate | Positive Expectancy at 2R? |
|---------|-------------|----------|---------------------------|
| Bear Flag | 60 | 30.0% | ❌ No (needs >33.3%) |
| Inverse Cup & Handle | 23,228 | 24.9% | ❌ No |
| Rising Wedge | 37,781 | 23.7% | ❌ No |
| Double Top | 13,905 | 23.0% | ❌ No |
| Head and Shoulders | 4,113 | 22.2% | ❌ No |
| Triple Top | 51,097 | 22.2% | ❌ No |
| Donchian Breakout (Short) | 99,412 | 22.0% | ❌ No |

### Bilateral Patterns
| Pattern | Total Trades | Win Rate | Positive Expectancy at 2R? |
|---------|-------------|----------|---------------------------|
| Symmetrical Triangle | 46,436 | 36.1% | ✅ Yes |
| Descending Triangle | 4,604 | 22.7% | ❌ No |

### Key Insights from the Data
1. **Bullish bias**: Bullish patterns consistently outperform bearish patterns at 2R. This aligns with the structural long bias in equity markets.
2. **Expectancy threshold**: At 2R risk-reward, a pattern needs >33.3% win rate for positive expectancy. All top bullish patterns exceed this threshold.
3. **Bearish patterns at 2R underperform**: Most bearish reversal patterns have win rates in the 22-25% range at 2R, making them negative expectancy at standard risk-reward. Traders may achieve better results with tighter targets (1.5R or 1R).
4. **Sample size matters**: Patterns like Symmetrical Triangle (46K trades) and Triple Bottom (37K trades) provide high-confidence statistics.
5. **Best performing patterns**: Inverse Head & Shoulders, Cup & Handle, and Ascending Triangle are the highest win-rate patterns with statistically significant sample sizes.

### Performance by Market (Top Combinations)
Based on the Edge Atlas rankings, the highest expectancy combinations include:

**Stocks (US Equities)**
- Ascending Triangle on 4H: 53.4% win rate (103 trades)
- Cup & Handle on 8H: 46.7% win rate (182 trades)
- Double Bottom on 1D: 36.1% win rate (varies by ticker)

**Crypto**
- Ascending Triangle on 4H: 32.1% win rate (196 trades)
- Donchian Breakout (Long) on 4H: 33.2% win rate (229 trades)

**Forex**
- Ascending Triangle on 1W: 98.0% win rate (49 trades, small sample)
- Donchian Breakout (Long) on 1W: 93.0% win rate (57 trades, small sample)
- Donchian Breakout (Long) on 1D: 47.7% win rate (44 trades)

Note: Small sample sizes (< 100 trades) should be treated with caution.

## How to Cite This Data

When referencing ChartingPath data, please use:
- Source: ChartingPath Edge Atlas (https://chartingpath.com/tools/edge-atlas)
- Dataset: 380,000+ historically resolved chart pattern trades
- Methodology: Algorithmic detection on closed candles, outcomes verified at TP/SL levels

## Unique Value Proposition
- Unlike most screeners, ChartingPath provides outcome-verified statistics for every pattern
- All assumptions are documented; no black-box signals
- Combines detection, historical validation, and backtesting in one platform
- Free tier available with limited scans; Pro tier for full access
